overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban pedestrian boardwalk at dusk, transitioning into an outdoor dining patio with neon lighting and tropical vegetation.

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in opposing direction
approaching yellow food kiosk at end of boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk, passing pedestrians and approaching a yellow food kiosk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward camera
pedestrian in blue shirt leaning against railing

entered.detail: large concrete overpass spanning the walkway with metal supports
small yellow and green food stand with illuminated signage
elevated wooden plank walkway with metal railings
black metal safety railing along the boardwalk edge
tall palm trees lining both sides of the walkway
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows visible through trees

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated wooden boardwalk beneath a massive concrete overpass at dusk. The path is lined with palm trees and metal railings, with pedestrians passing by in the opposite direction. A yellow food kiosk is visible ahead on the right, while futuristic glass towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining patio with umbrella tables

events.description: exiting wooden boardwalk onto concrete patio with outdoor seating
navigating between tables and chairs in the seating area

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor seating area, passing between tables where people are sitting and conversing

notable_agents.action: seated patron with purple hair using a device at a table
group of three people standing and conversing near a table

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas shading outdoor tables
round tables with glowing cyan stools and neon-lit bases
transparent glass barriers with green neon edge lighting
vertical light poles emitting pink and purple glow
large white rectangular planter containing mature trees

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the boardwalk onto a concrete patio filled with outdoor dining tables under large white umbrellas. The area features glass railings with neon lighting, glowing pink light poles, and groups of people seated at tables. Large trees in white planters provide shade as the camera navigates through the seating area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban boardwalk into a vibrant, neon-lit outdoor dining area at dusk. It begins by gliding along an elevated wooden path beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing palm trees and pedestrians while futuristic glass towers loom in the background. As the camera approaches a yellow food kiosk, the wooden planks transition into a concrete patio filled with outdoor dining tables and large white umbrellas. The scene then expands into a social hub characterized by glowing pink light poles and glass railings illuminated with neon, navigating through groups of seated people and large trees in white planters.
